_about: RFC 0002 P0 — frozen FTS-only retrieval baseline. Produced read-only by runtime.service.learnings.eval.run(). Every later phase re-runs eval and must improve these numbers, never regress. The self_probe.dark_count and the surfacing audit's newly_dark gate stay empty across phases.

paraphrase_post_p1._note: Captured 2026-06-10 AFTER P1 (frontmatter + structured coverage), against the frozen authored fixture tests/fixtures/paraphrase_probes.json (22 probes). This is the semantic-headroom yardstick for P2/P3: queries share meaning but not words with their gold. The 7 misses @5 are pure meaning!=words cases (incl. one cross-lingual English-query/Korean-body probe) — the class only semantic retrieval can recover.

paraphrase_p2_semantic_only._note: Captured 2026-06-11 — semantic mode ALONE (VecSemantic over bge-m3, dim 1024, no lexical, no fusion) on the same 22-probe fixture. Beats lexical (R@5 0.682) by +0.18. Recovered 4 of 7 lexical misses incl. the cross-lingual EN-query/KO-body probe (rank 0). NOT a strict superset of lexical hits — the argument for P3 fusion (RRF) rather than replacement. Bulk embed: 855s one-time for ~22K chunks on an M1 Pro; steady-state reindex reuses the content-hash cache.

p3_hybrid._note: Captured 2026-06-11 — RFC 0002 P3 LANDED. recall + learnings/search now route through runtime.search.resolver: lexical (FTS5 BM25) + semantic (VecSemantic/bge-m3) fused by Reciprocal Rank Fusion (C=60), inline hand-boosts retired to RFC-scaled post-fusion nudges (gap-scaled, not vote-scaled). engine='hybrid'. Improves every frozen P0 metric: self_probe dark_count 26->0 @k5 and 12->0 @k10 (the dark-learnings class dissolved); concept R@5 0.588->0.963, P@5 0.325->0.545; self_probe MRR@5 0.582->0.975. The omission gate (surfacing newly_dark) stays empty. PARAPHRASE TRADEOFF: hybrid R@5 0.727 sits BELOW the P2 semantic-only probe (0.864) on that adversarial-for-lexical fixture — unweighted RRF dilutes semantic's edge with lexical's wrong votes on pure meaning!=words queries. Acceptable: it is the common-case-optimal point, and recovering the semantic tail is the P5 reranker / weighted-fusion job. Boost constants tuned against the live vault gate (see surfacing audit), NOT guessed.

surfacing_audit_k5._note: Audit total (135) is one more than eval self_probe.probes (134): one accepted learning has no concept tag and no usable title, so it has an empty self-probe. eval excludes empty-probe rows from its denominator; the audit counts it (dark by construction).

p4_relational_rfc0003._note: Captured 2026-06-12 — RFC 0003 rollout landed the connectivity foundation, reviving RFC 0002 P4. RFC 0003 entity-stub backfill connected learnings into the graph: graph-connectivity 1% → 75% (123/164; the 41 unconnected have no touches/topic tags). Relational mode (LinkRelational, 3rd signal) wired as a GATED POST-FUSION NUDGE, not an equal RRF vote — an equal vote flooded the dense concept graph and regressed hard (dark@5 0→72). As a gentle nudge it is regression-free but supplementary: on this near-ceiling vault it does not move aggregate metrics, and it does NOT subsume the concept hand-boost (retiring the boost regresses concept_grouped P@5 0.545→0.522), so the boost STAYS. The relational win (a body-less concept-sibling surfacing via the shared-entity graph) is demonstrated in isolation.
